faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Common questions about working with Praxis Recruitment

items.question: Are you a traditional recruitment agency?
items.answer: No. We are practitioners first. We recruit within industries we personally work in.

items.question: What roles do you specialize in?
items.answer: Mid to senior-level Digital Marketing and IT roles where deep industry understanding is essential.

items.question: How long does the hiring process take?
items.answer: Typically 2–7 weeks, depending on role complexity and market conditions.

items.question: Do you offer guarantees?
items.answer: An employee's long-term success is shaped by the onboarding experience, leadership, and internal processes within the company. As these elements are managed internally, we cannot fully guarantee future performance outcomes. What we do guarantee is a committed candidate who is prepared, motivated, and ready to start on their first working day.

items.question: Do you work internationally?
items.answer: Yes. While we begin in Lithuania, we are open to international partnerships.

finalCta.title: Hire with Insight. Not Guesswork.
finalCta.subtitle: Let's discuss your next Digital or IT hire.

hr.name: Human Resources
hr.description: HR professionals, talent acquisition, people ops

about.title: About Praxis Recruitment
about.paragraph1: Praxis Recruitment is built on a foundation of real-world experience. Our team consists of seasoned professionals who have worked across Technology, Digital Marketing, and HR sectors.
about.paragraph2: We don't just match resumes to job descriptions. We understand the nuances of each role, the culture of your organization, and the aspirations of candidates.
